sutta: on 1 occasion when the exalted 1 was dwelling among the maghadis at anda kavinda the venerable ananda came to him saluted and sat down at 1 side and the exalted 1 spoke dust to the vulnerable ananda so seated ananda the monks that are novices lately gone forth come newly to this dhammavinaya those monks ananda verily must be made to take heed of and enter into and stand fast in 5 things what 5 say thus come users be virtuous live restrained in the restraint of the patimoka perfect in conduct and resort seeing danger in the smallest fault an endeavor to train in the steps of the training thus must they be made to take heed off and enter into and stand fast in the restraint of the patimoka and say thus come users live with the sense doors guarded guarding mindfulness skillful in mindfulness with the ways of the mind well watched possessed of a mind that is guarded and aware thus must they be made to take heat off and enter into and stand fast in the restraint of the senses and say thus again to them come users belittle in talk make a limit to talk thus must they be made to take heed of enter into and stand fast in the limiting of talk and say thus to them come users forest dwellers seek you the ways of the forest wilderness the outland bed and sea thus must they be made to take heed of enter into and stand fast in seclusion as to the body and say thus to them come users be right in view seeing right thus must they be made to take heed of enter into and stand fast in having right view ananda the novices lately gone forth come newly to this dhamma vinaya must be made to take heed of enter into and stand fast in these 5 things that's the end of the sutta
commentary: it's quite an important suta for monks the buddha is saying that new monks must be advised to practice these 5 things the first 1 is to live restrained according to the pati moka patimoka is the set of precepts for monks who higher ordination uh the pattu moka consists of 227 precepts for monks so the first 1 is they have to train in these precepts of the patimoka the second 1 the buddha says that they should restrain the sense doors god the sense doors and always be mindful and aware the third 1 is they should limit their talk talk only beneficial talk and not to talk an unbeneficial talk the fourth 1 is the buddha advised them to be a translation foreign think of the bollywood aranya aranya is a secluded place it can be a forest can be a cave it can be up in the hill etc and the buddha um generally the buddha advised that new monks should train under a senior monk for 5 years but the buddha made an exception if a monk is fairly knowledgeable in the dhamma and vinaya even though he has not completed 5 years he can go and live alone if he wants to meditate because people are different there are some monks who have quite capable even though they are new monks then the buddha said that they can go and live alone in forest areas that is practicing seclusion as to the body that means kaya viveka kaya is body viveka is seclusion then the fifth 1 is to have right view and the way to have right view 1 is to study the discourses of the buddha the early discourses of the buddha to obtain right viewers these are the advice that new monks should be given the nexus is point

items: live restrained in the restraint of the patimoka
restrain the sense doors and always be mindful and aware
limit their talk, talk only beneficial talk and not to talk an unbeneficial talk
be a translation foreign, think of the secluded place
